title: NZ School Holidays Travel Tips — How to Beat the Crowds and Save Money
meta_desc: Discover how to save money and avoid crowds during NZ school holidays with our expert travel tips
intro: If you're planning to travel during the NZ school holidays, you'll know that prices skyrocket and popular spots get crowded. But with some insider knowledge, you can save up to 30% on accommodation and activities. In this article, we'll share our top tips for travelling during peak season, including how to find affordable accommodation and avoid the crowds.

sections.heading: Plan Ahead to Save Money
sections.body: Booking your accommodation and activities well in advance is crucial to saving money during the school holidays. Many popular destinations, such as Queenstown and Rotorua, offer early bird discounts for bookings made at least 6 months in advance. For example, a family room at the Millennium Hotel Rotorua can cost around $350 per night during peak season, but booking 6 months in advance can bring the price down to $250 per night.

sections.heading: Avoid the Crowds
list: Visit popular attractions early in the morning or late in the evening to avoid the crowds
Consider visiting lesser-known destinations, such as the Coromandel Peninsula or the West Coast
Book a guided tour to avoid queues and get insider knowledge on the best spots to visit

sections.heading: Drive Times and Road Conditions
sections.body: If you're planning a road trip during the school holidays, make sure to check the drive times and road conditions before you leave. The drive from Auckland to Rotorua, for example, can take around 3 hours via State Highway 1, but can be longer during peak season due to traffic. You can check the latest road conditions on the NZ Transport Agency website.

sections.heading: Accommodation Options
list: Hotel: Millennium Hotel Rotorua (from $250 per night)
Motel: Bella Vista Motel Rotorua (from $180 per night)
Holiday Park: Rotorua Top 10 Holiday Park (from $40 per night for a campsite)

sections.heading: Budgeting for Your Trip
sections.body: To get an idea of how much your trip will cost, use our NZ Family Travel Budget Calculator. This handy tool will help you estimate the cost of accommodation, food, and activities, and give you a total budget for your trip.

cta.text: Try our NZ Family Travel Budget Calculator

sections.heading: More Travel Tips and Ideas
sections.body: For more travel tips and ideas, check out our destinations page, which features articles on the best places to visit in NZ, as well as practical advice on how to get there and what to do when you arrive.

sections.heading: Book Your Campervan Today
sections.body: If you're planning a road trip, consider booking a campervan. We have a range of campervans available, from budget-friendly options to luxury models with all the mod cons. Prices start from around $100 per day.
